expected_findings.evidence: Red circles cover multiple regions, but cross-checking with FP-026 detector (tools/diagnose_wall_stubs.py) shows several circled areas are door jambs / window mullions — correct geometry, NOT residual stubs.

ambiguous_or_false_positive_regions: possible door jamb (wall portion framing a door opening — legitimate geometry)
possible window mullion (wall portion between/around window aperture — legitimate)
possible valid opening detail (e.g. opening reveal, jamb shadow at carve edge)
training_note: Per FP-030 confidence-tier policy (bad_real_ambiguous): this example may contribute to WARN but MUST NOT train hard FAIL heuristics. The FP-026 stub detector remains the authority for confirmed wall_stub findings.
source: real marked screenshot from planta_74 SKP render
